title: Syd's Simple Commands
body:
# Syd's Simple Commands

A mod that contains multiple commands designed to make your game experience easier.


Tired of trying to figure out what commands you need to use to do something? Tired of having to type out /gamemode survival? This mod makes everything super simple! Using the built in help menu, you will be able to see what commands are available in your version.


Version 1.2, the first public build, contains the following commands:
- gmc: Sets your gamemode to creative
- gms: Sets your gamemode to survival
- gma: Sets your gamemode to adventure
- gmsp: Sets your gamemode to spectator
- go: Allows you to travel between dimensions with 1 command! You can use this command by typing /go overworld/end/nether!
